recommendations.title: Troublemakers
recommendations.overview: Two brothers who hate themselves are going to spend Christmas with their mother. She tries to get them together.

recommendations.title: Lucky Luke
recommendations.overview: Lucky Luke becomes the Sheriff of Daisy Town and runs out all the criminals. Then the Dalton brothers arrive and try to get the Indians to break the peace treaty and attack the town.

recommendations.title: A Shaun the Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organization can capture her.

recommendations.title: I'm for the Hippopotamus
recommendations.overview: In Africa, Slim and Tom don't like it when a German tyrant starts selling all of the African wildlife to Canadian zoos. Slim and Tom must teach this guy a lesson by beating the hell out of him and his gang.

recommendations.title: The Boondock Saints II: All Saints Day
recommendations.overview: Skillfully framed by an unknown enemy for the murder of a priest, wanted vigilante MacManus brothers Murphy and Connor must come out of hiding on a sheep farm in Ireland to fight for justice in Boston.

recommendations.title: Babe
recommendations.overview: Babe is a little pig who doesn't quite know his place in the world. With a bunch of odd friends, like Ferdinand the duck who thinks he is a rooster and Fly the dog he calls mum, Babe realises that he has the makings to become the greatest sheep pig o

recommendations.title: Double Trouble
recommendations.overview: A stuntman and a saxophonist stand in for two billionaires threatened by killers.

recommendations.title: My Hero Academia: World Heroes' Mission
recommendations.overview: A mysterious group called Humarize strongly believes in the Quirk Singularity Doomsday theory which states that when quirks get mixed further in with future generations, that power will bring forth the end of humanity. In order to save everyone, the

recommendations.title: Feyzo, The Polite One
recommendations.overview: To bid for his beloved's hand in marriage, poor villager Feyzo must come up with an enormous dowry to appease her father.

recommendations.title: My Hero Academia: Heroes Rising
